result.instructions: RepoPrompt Headless is running the standalone read-oriented safe profile over direct stdio. Configure allowed roots with `repoprompt-headless config roots add /absolute/path --name NAME`. Only bind_context, constrained manage_workspaces, manage_selection, workspace_context, get_file_tree, get_code_structure, read_file, file_search, and prompt are enabled.

tools.name: bind_context
tools.description: List, inspect, or bind the single headless session to a configured workspace.

workspace.description: Workspace id or name for bind.

tools.description: Manage headless workspaces without adding arbitrary filesystem roots.
tools.name: manage_workspaces

tools.description: Read or mutate the active workspace selection using allowed root-contained paths only.
tools.name: manage_selection

include.description: prompt, selection, code, tokens, files, tree

path.description: Export path; relative paths stay under state Exports/.

tools.description: Render or export the active workspace prompt/selection/code/files/tree context.
tools.name: workspace_context
get_file_tree
tools.description: Return an ASCII tree for configured roots, a subpath, or selected files.
Return lightweight headless code signatures for paths or selected files.
tools.name: get_code_structure

tools.description: Read a UTF-8 file under configured roots with optional line slicing.
tools.name: read_file
file_search
tools.description: Search paths and/or UTF-8 file contents under configured roots.
Get, set, append, clear, export, or list the built-in headless prompt preset.
tools.name: prompt

path.description: Export path; relative paths stay under state Exports/.
